notes:
To run the game you need to click on Set Launch Options and type -Linux , this is the only tweak you need to do to play it. 
There aren't performances issues inside the game, your country flag will be the Linux flag.
If you click outside the game or alt+tab the game the game may become unplayable for several minutes or stop working.
title: Beat Hazard 2

notes: Actual gameplay and performance feel solid, some modes are unusable and some menu entries like "Find music" cause game to go unresponsive.
title: Beat Hazard 2

notes:
You need to either launch the game with parameter '-Linux' or set a country flag via regedit:
in HKCU/Controls Panel/International/Geo, value name is Nation - REG_SZ - https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/desktop/Intl/table-of-geographical-locations

protontricks 618740 vcrun2013

You also need to install vcrun2013 to set an override that prevents endless syncing screen upon game startup.
title: Beat Hazard 2

notes: Gameplay is fine with "-Linux". Crashes when I attempt to use a radio station. Crashed for me when scanning music and running into certain files (.mkvs, and a few mp3s that seemed to work fine outside of BH2.) I recommend scanning large libraries in parts because hitting a bad file loses all scanned progress that attempt.
title: Beat Hazard 2

cpu: AMD A10-7700K Radeon R7, 10 Compute Cores 4C+6G
notes: The game does not work under ubuntu the game wont start at all
title: Beat Hazard 2
